content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''223''' was a group of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|Corellian Corvettes]] that spread mines around an Imperial listening post above [[Saheelindeel]].

Although the post was far from [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] territory, they were destroyed along with the listening satellite in order to divert the Empire from the actual location.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]''

[[Category:CR90 corvettes|*]]
[[Category:Galactic Empire starship groups]]
